titleStmt.title: SII 5.82: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 82. (A.R. No. 482-K of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sarvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājādhirājō rāja
paramēśvaraḥ paramabhaṭṭārakaḥ paramamāhēśvaraḥ paramabrahma
ṇyaḥ śrīrājarājadēvaḥ paramahīpālamaulimālyāyamā
tējōvirājitaścālukyabhīmapurē paścimadiśi rājanārā
yaṇaviṣṇugṛhē sannihitāya bhagavatē viṣṇubhaṭṭārakāya
prōlunāṁṭipuliguṁṭanāmagrāmasya dēvabhōgīkṛtya datvā ta
sya grāmasya kṣētrē tasyaiva viṣṇubhaṭṭārakasya nibandhakārāṇāmācā
ryyapramukhāṇāṁ vṛttinibandhamājñāpayatti yathā nārayaṇanaṁbi
yayni Ācāryyunaku mummaḍibhīmakolanācāryyabhōgamugā ni
ccina yuḍubu bhūmi kha jonnabhūmi kha 4 Ārādhiṁcu brāhmaṇunaku
nuḍububhūmi kha 3 jonnabhūmi kha 3 nivēdyamu vaṇḍeḍu brāhmaṇu
naku nuḍububhūmi kha 3 garuvubhūmi kha 3 lōpala banisēyu brāhmaṇunaku
nuḍupubhūmi kha 3 garuvubhūmi kha 3 garagapanisēyu brāhmaṇu
naku nuḍububhūmi kha 3 garavu bhūmi kha 3 tiruvāmuḍi pāḍu rā
jasuṁdarābrahmamarāyani nuḍububhūmi kha garuvubhūmi
kha sānināyaghava yeṟiyakka cāmarayu nāyakamunuṁ jelu
kabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 dārakapa prōlaku cāmarayuṁ jelu
kabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 Eṟiyaka kosaniki cāmarayunu
celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 prōlava gonnaka cāmarayu
nu celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 cimmaka Aṁkkavaku celuka
bhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 saṁkava vāsikiṁ jeluka
bhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 Āyanava kommakakuṁ jelukabhū
mi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 rājamava vallekakuṁ jelukabhūmi
kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 Eṟiyaka bhadirikiṁ celukabhūmi kha 4
garuvubhūmi kha 4 Eṟiyakava kētikiṁ jelukabhūmi kha 4 garu
vubhūmi kha 4 kūcamava Eṟiyaku celukabhūmi kha 4 garu
vubhūmi kha 4 Eṟiyaka pellaki celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhū
mi kha 4 maṟiyaka dāmavaku celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha
4 mēḍava komaravaku celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi
kha 4 paṁpava cīḍi celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4
rakapa Eṟiyavaku celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4
vasapa suriki celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha 4 canna
pa surikiṁ celukabhūmi kha 4 garuvubhūmi kha
4 kummaniki celukabhūmi kha 3 garuvubhūmi kha 3 ko
mmarā nairutyamuna polamuna pōṁkatōṁṭa bhūmi kha
1 tu 15 ṁtta Eṟiyakakuṁ je
lukabhūmi kha 4 garubhūmi kha 4
Ayanapa koṇḍakaku
śaguvaccaramulu 16 srahi maṇḍaya koḍuku dā
mōdaruṇḍu puliguṁṭa dēvara caruvapu maḍilō
na prōlapa kuṁtuṟu saṁkavaku jelkabhūmi kha 4
garubhūmikha 4 .
Digital edition of SII 5.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
